# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  DEPLOY_TAG: ""
  RELEASE_NOTES_FILE: "release_notes.md"

stages:
  - validate
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

validate_mr:
  stage: validate
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
  script:
    - echo "Validating Merge Request..."
    - echo "MR Title - $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "MR Description - $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "MR IID - $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID"
    - echo "MR Source Branch - $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME"
    - echo "MR Target Branch - $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_NAME"
    - |
      if [ -z "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Merge request title is empty. Please provide a meaningful title."
        exit 1
      fi
    - |
      if echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | grep -qiE "^(feat|fix|docs|style|refactor|perf|test|chore|ci|build|revert):"; then
        echo "MR title follows conventional commit format."
      else
        echo "WARNING: MR title does not follow conventional commit format (e.g., feat: add new feature)."
        echo "Recommended prefixes: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, chore, ci, build, revert"
      fi

build:
  stage: build
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  script:
    - echo "Building application..."
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "Building for MR !$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID - $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        BUILD_LABEL="mr-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}-$(echo $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/-$//')"
      else
        BUILD_LABEL="branch-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      fi
    - echo "Build label - $BUILD_LABEL"
    - echo "$BUILD_LABEL" > build_label.txt
    - echo "Build completed successfully"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build_label.txt
    expire_in: 1 week

test:
  stage: test
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  script:
    - echo "Running tests..."
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "Testing changes from MR !$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID - $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
      fi
    - echo "All tests passed"

generate_release_notes:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  script:
    - echo "Generating release notes..."
    - |
      TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
      VERSION="v$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"

      cat > $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE << EOF
      # Release Notes - ${VERSION}

      **Date:** ${TIMESTAMP}
      **Commit:** ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}
      **Branch:** ${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}
      **Pipeline:** ${CI_PIPELINE_URL}

      ## Changes

      ### Commit Details
      - **Message:** ${CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}
      - **Author:** ${CI_COMMIT_AUTHOR}
      - **Timestamp:** ${CI_COMMIT_TIMESTAMP}

      EOF

    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        cat >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE << EOF

      ### Merge Request Details
      - **MR:** !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID} - ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}
      - **Source Branch:** ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME}
      - **Target Branch:** ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_NAME}
      - **Labels:** ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_LABELS}

      ### Description
      ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}

      EOF
      fi

    - |
      echo "---" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      echo "### Recent Commits in this Pipeline" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      git log --oneline -10 >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE || echo "Unable to fetch git log" >> $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE

    - cat $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
    - echo "$VERSION" > deploy_version.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
      - deploy_version.txt
    expire_in: 90 days

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
    - job: generate_release_notes
      artifacts: true
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging..."
    - VERSION=$(cat deploy_version.txt)
    - BUILD_LABEL=$(cat build_label.txt)
    - echo "Deploying version $VERSION with build label $BUILD_LABEL"
    - |
      DEPLOY_TAG="${VERSION}"
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        SANITIZED_TITLE=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//' | sed 's/-$//' | cut -c1-50)
        DEPLOY_TAG="${VERSION}-${SANITIZED_TITLE}"
        echo "Deploy tag includes MR title - $DEPLOY_TAG"
      fi
      echo "DEPLOY_TAG=${DEPLOY_TAG}" >> deploy.env
    - echo "Creating deployment tag - $DEPLOY_TAG"
    - |
      TAG_MESSAGE="Deployment to staging"
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        TAG_MESSAGE="Deploy MR !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
      fi
    - |
      git config user.email "ci@example.com"
      git config user.name "GitLab CI"
    - |
      git tag -a "$DEPLOY_TAG" -m "$TAG_MESSAGE" -m "Pipeline: $CI_PIPELINE_URL" -m "Commit: $CI_COMMIT_SHA" 2>/dev/null || echo "Tag creation skipped (may already exist or insufficient permissions)"
    - |
      git push origin "$DEPLOY_TAG" 2>/dev/null || echo "Tag push skipped (may require deploy key permissions)"
    - echo "Staging deployment completed with tag - $DEPLOY_TAG"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: deploy.env

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: manual
  needs:
    - job: deploy_staging
      artifacts: true
    - job: generate_release_notes
      artifacts: true
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production..."
    - echo "Using deploy tag - $DEPLOY_TAG"
    - VERSION=$(cat deploy_version.txt)
    - |
      PROD_TAG="prod-${VERSION}"
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        SANITIZED_TITLE=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//' | sed 's/-$//' | cut -c1-50)
        PROD_TAG="prod-${VERSION}-${SANITIZED_TITLE}"
      fi
    - echo "Production deploy tag - $PROD_TAG"
    - |
      PROD_TAG_MESSAGE="Production deployment"
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        PROD_TAG_MESSAGE="Production Deploy MR !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
      fi
    - |
      git config user.email "ci@example.com"
      git config user.name "GitLab CI"
    - |
      git tag -a "$PROD_TAG" -m "$PROD_TAG_MESSAGE" -m "Pipeline: $CI_PIPELINE_URL" -m "Commit: $CI_COMMIT_SHA" -m "Staging tag: $DEPLOY_TAG" 2>/dev/null || echo "Tag creation skipped"
    - |
      git push origin "$PROD_TAG" 2>/dev/null || echo "Tag push skipped"
    - echo "Production deployment completed with tag - $PROD_TAG"

notify_slack:
  stage: notify
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  needs:
    - job: deploy_staging
      artifacts: true
    - job: generate_release_notes
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - echo "Preparing build notification..."
    - VERSION=$(cat deploy_version.txt)
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        NOTIFICATION_TITLE="🚀 Deployment: MR !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID} - ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
        NOTIFICATION_BODY="Feature deployed to staging"
        
        if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" ]; then
          DESCRIPTION_PREVIEW=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" | head -5)
          NOTIFICATION_BODY="${NOTIFICATION_BODY}\n\nDescription:\n${DESCRIPTION_PREVIEW}"
        fi
        
        if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_LABELS" ]; then
          NOTIFICATION_BODY="${NOTIFICATION_BODY}\n\nLabels: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_LABELS}"
        fi
      else
        NOTIFICATION_TITLE="🚀 Deployment: ${CI_COMMIT_TITLE}"
        NOTIFICATION_BODY="Commit deployed to staging"
      fi
    - |
      NOTIFICATION_BODY="${NOTIFICATION_BODY}\n\nVersion: ${VERSION}"
      NOTIFICATION_BODY="${NOTIFICATION_BODY}\nDeploy Tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
      NOTIFICATION_BODY="${NOTIFICATION_BODY}\nCommit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      NOTIFICATION_BODY="${NOTIFICATION_BODY}\nAuthor: ${CI_COMMIT_AUTHOR}"
      NOTIFICATION_BODY="${NOTIFICATION_BODY}\nPipeline: ${CI_PIPELINE_URL}"
    - echo "=== NOTIFICATION ==="
    - echo "$NOTIFICATION_TITLE"
    - echo -e "$NOTIFICATION_BODY"
    - echo "===================="
    - |
      if [ -n "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then
        ESCAPED_TITLE=$(echo "$NOTIFICATION_TITLE" | sed 's/"/\\"/g')
        ESCAPED_BODY=$(echo -e "$NOTIFICATION_BODY" | sed 's/"/\\"/g' | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')
        
        PAYLOAD=$(cat << EOFPAYLOAD
      {
        "text": "${ESCAPED_TITLE}",
        "blocks": [
          {
            "type": "header",
            "text": {
              "type": "plain_text",
              "text": "${ESCAPED_TITLE}"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "text": {
              "type": "mrkdwn",
              "text": "${ESCAPED_BODY}"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "actions",
            "elements": [
              {
                "type": "button",
                "text": {
                  "type": "plain_text",
                  "text": "View Pipeline"
                },
                "url": "${CI_PIPELINE_URL}"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
      EOFPAYLOAD
        )
        
        curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' --data "$PAYLOAD" "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" || echo "Slack notification failed"
      else
        echo "SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL not set, skipping Slack notification"
      fi

notify_email:
  stage: notify
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  needs:
    - job: deploy_staging
      artifacts: true
    - job: generate_release_notes
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - echo "Preparing email notification with release notes..."
    - VERSION=$(cat deploy_version.txt)
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        EMAIL_SUBJECT="[Deploy] MR !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE} - ${VERSION}"
      else
        EMAIL_SUBJECT="[Deploy] ${CI_COMMIT_TITLE} - ${VERSION}"
      fi
    - echo "Email Subject: $EMAIL_SUBJECT"
    - echo "Release notes content:"
    - cat $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
    - |
      if [ -n "$NOTIFICATION_EMAIL" ] && command -v mail &> /dev/null; then
        mail -s "$EMAIL_SUBJECT" "$NOTIFICATION_EMAIL" < $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE || echo "Email notification failed"
      else
        echo "Email notification skipped (NOTIFICATION_EMAIL not set or mail command not available)"
      fi

create_gitlab_release:
  stage: notify
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  needs:
    - job: deploy_staging
      artifacts: true
    - job: generate_release_notes
      artifacts: true
  image: registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/release-cli:latest
  script:
    - VERSION=$(cat deploy_version.txt)
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        RELEASE_NAME="MR !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
        RELEASE_DESCRIPTION=$(cat << EOF
      ## ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}

      **Merge Request:** !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}
      **Source Branch:** ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME}
      **Deploy Tag:** ${DEPLOY_TAG}

      ### Description
      ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}

      ---
      *Automatically generated by GitLab CI pipeline [#${CI_PIPELINE_IID}](${CI_PIPELINE_URL})*
      EOF
      )
      else
        RELEASE_NAME="${CI_COMMIT_TITLE}"
        RELEASE_DESCRIPTION=$(cat << EOF
      ## ${CI_COMMIT_TITLE}

      **Commit:** ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
      **Author:** ${CI_COMMIT_AUTHOR}
      **Deploy Tag:** ${DEPLOY_TAG}

      ---
      *Automatically generated by GitLab CI pipeline [#${CI_PIPELINE_IID}](${CI_PIPELINE_URL})*
      EOF
      )
      fi
    - echo "Release Name - $RELEASE_NAME"
    - echo "Release Description - $RELEASE_DESCRIPTION"
  release:
    tag_name: $DEPLOY_TAG
    name: $RELEASE_NAME
    description: $RELEASE_DESCRIPTION
    ref: $CI_COMMIT_SHA
